title: The Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (Amendment) Act, 2026: A comprehensive analysis
description: The Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (Amendment) Bill, 2025 has received Presidential assent as the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (Amendment) Act, 2026 (the “Act”) and will come into force on notification by the Central government. It makes significant changes to the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, codifying, qualifying, and materially reshaping insolvency practice in India.Initiation of Corporate Insolvency Resolution ProcessThe Act removes the discretion previously read into Section 7 and
